top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran make ‘progress’ in talks, aim to keep Hormuz open
top_signals.summary: The two sides will continue technical-level discussions this week, mediators said, even as President Donald Trump again threatened strikes if Hezbollah keeps attacking Israel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Global Banks Drive India Asset-Backed Securities Sales to Record
top_signals.summary: India’s asset-backed securities market has surged to a record as global banks ramp up purchases to gain exposure to one of the world’s fastest-growing major economies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Commission greenlights Bulgaria's fourth payment request under NextGenerationEU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 19 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission greenlighted Bulgaria's fourth payment request under the Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF), the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.
